caption: Bedok town centre and transport interchange viewed from above, dominated by a large curved-roof bus interchange structure running parallel to a major road. HDB blocks and sports courts with green playing surfaces are visible in the upper portion, while warehouse and commercial buildings with solar panel installations occupy the lower half. A swimming pool complex is visible in the upper left area.

analysis.notable: Bedok integrated transport hub with distinctive curved-roof bus interchange clearly visible from above, flanked by HDB residential blocks and commercial warehouses.
